'''Griann''' was an agricultural town on the planet of [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]], located in the [[Greenbelt]]. It was laid out in a perfect checkerboard grid pattern and catered to the working-class.

In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his companion [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell|Akanah]] traveled to the quiet town of Griann via [[Flyway 120]] seeking traces of the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]].

{{City-stub}}
